Research Support Office (ARDES)

As the

Research Support Office (ARDES)

, established in 2025, our mission is to support the development of

Doğuş University as a research-oriented university

, to enhance the visibility of academic work across diverse research fields through increasing national and international collaborations, to ensure the efficient management of publication processes, and to provide our researchers with

guidance and support at every stage

. Through these efforts, we aim to strengthen the overall

research development ecosystem

of the University.

ARDES seeks to improve the quality of scientific publications by offering guidance to academic staff on

manuscript preparation, journal selection, and peer-review processes.

By encouraging participation in

reviewer and editorial activities

for prestigious journals, ARDES contributes to the academic engagement of our faculty with the global research community. The Office also supports scientific productivity by facilitating access to

databases and academic resources

that researchers can utilize in their work. In addition, ARDES undertakes activities to assess the compliance of publications with

international standards

and provides

English language editing support

. ARDES has launched an ongoing

monthly seminar series

featuring leading national and international researchers from Doğuş University and other institutions, fostering academic exchange and research collaboration.

Furthermore, ARDES promotes

academic mentoring programs

between senior academics and early-career researchers to strengthen knowledge and experience transfer, and supports the engagement of

high-achieving students

in academic research activities. We welcome all academic staff who require support at any stage of the publication process to collaborate with ARDES.
